rate_analysis.interpretation: Rate decelerated from 0.0047 to 0.0032/L. S387 acceleration was temporary — back to S355-era rate.

hub_analysis.discrepancy_note: S387 96 count was inflated — likely counted multi-mentions within same citing lesson. Unique citing-lessons is 70 (body regex) or 67 (nk_null_model.py). Both methods agree within ~5%.

hub_z_acceleration.interpretation: Hub z still rising but decelerating. L-601 structural enforcement theorem remains dominant hub at 2.06x L-001.

isolation_regime_change.interpretation: Isolation now HIGHLY SIGNIFICANT (was marginal **). Non-random isolation structure has become persistent — orphan lessons cluster by topic, not randomly.

expectations_vs_actual.L601_actual: 2.06x (was reported 1.88x but inflated — both rise proportionally)
expectations_vs_actual.DOMEX_actual: not retested this session — regression model from S372 still valid

key_finding: Hub count inflation in prior tracking: S387 reported L-601 at 96 incoming, actual unique is 67-70. The 96 count double-counted multi-mentions within citing lessons. This affects all prior hub succession narratives. The L-601 > L-001 succession is real (2.06x) but the magnitude was overstated.
verdict: NK tracking nominal. K_avg rate decelerated to 0.0032/L (was 0.0047). Hub z acceleration slowing. Isolation now fully significant. Hub count inflation discovered — corrects prior tracking.
